ip_outcome_note: Pokemon TCG cards are always officially licensed depictions of the named species. Card name = Stoutland; depicted creature matches Stoutland's distinctive shaggy-dog-with-mustache design. Game Freak / Nintendo IP — internal to the Pokemon TCG system. No external IP risk.

trivia_bullets.text: Stoutland is National Pokedex no. 508 — a Normal-type Stage 2 Pokemon (Lillipup → Herdier → Stoutland) introduced in Generation 5 (Unova). The Sun & Moon Base Set (SM1) was released February 3, 2017, launching the Sun & Moon series of the Pokemon TCG. [Serebii card database / PkmnCards, via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Serebii card database via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text (verbatim from card): "Intelligent, good-natured, and valiant, it's a trustworthy partner on rescue teams." This entry describes Stoutland's canonical lore role as a mountain and sea rescue partner — a trait carried across multiple Pokedex entries. [Frontmatter flavor_text field; consistent with Pokemon.com TCG Database, via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Pokemon.com TCG Database via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: Art is by Kagemaru Himeno [card frontmatter artist field], a prolific Pokemon TCG illustrator active since the Base Set era. The card is a Stage 2 Colorless-type with 150 HP. Attacks: Ferocious Bellow (CCC) — 50 damage, reduces Defending Pokemon's attacks by 50 damage next turn; Hammer In (CCCC) — 120 damage. [Serebii / PkmnCards, via WebSearch snippet]

Stoutland's design is based on a combination of a Shih Tzu and Maltese, with traits from Yorkshire and Scottish Terriers; its rescue abilities parallel real-world St. Bernards and Newfoundlands. The mustache is a canonical status marker within the species — length indicates social rank among Stoutland. [Bulbapedia: Stoutland, via WebSearch snippet]
